title: World Preview NeoForged
description:
Preview your world before you create it. 
A port of World Preview by caeruleusDraconis to Neoforge 1.21.1
body:
# World Preview NeoForged
This is an unofficial port of the [World Preview](https://modrinth.com/mod/world-preview). The original mod did support 1.21.x but its only in fabric and forge modloaders. It was a vital mod for my use cases so I decided to port this incredibly versatile tool so the setup is easier especially when you are on the lookout for the perfect spawn.
__________________________________________________________________________________________________

### IMPORTANT
However TFC does not have full compatibility with this port but [World Preview TFC](https://modrinth.com/mod/world-preview-terrafirmacraft) does.

## Previews
Here are some of the previews provided by the mod.
